expectations.text: Response reports current HP (and ideally mana/move points)
Response reports carried and/or worn items
expectations.evidence: summary.md lists 'Inventory (carried, not worn)' and full 'Equipment (worn)' section

expectations.text: No lingering connection to the MUD server (port 4000) or stray background process after the task finishes
expectations.evidence: Verified independently after the run: `ss -tn | grep :4000` returned nothing, no stray process found via pgrep

notes: Hand-rolled a raw Python socket script with its own telnet IAC stripping in a single script invocation rather than a persistent daemon; functionally equivalent output for this eval.
